title: Sports and Health Game Zone

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Related to the physical features of the Earth and how places are arranged
rounds.answer: geographic

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A three-dimensional artwork made by shaping materials like stone, metal, or clay
rounds.answer: sculpture

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Related to living things and how they work
rounds.answer: biological

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Sports and Health: source text 2': The _____ Daniel, peace be upon him, encouraged physical activity and strength.
rounds.answer: Forecaster
rounds.explanation: The text says: The forecaster Daniel, peace be upon him, encouraged physical activity and strength.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Sports and Health: source text 2': If you do not eat enough healthy food, your performance will _____ over time.
rounds.answer: deteriorate
rounds.explanation: The text says: If you do not eat enough healthy food, your performance will deteriorate over time.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Sports and Health: source text 1': If you train regularly, your heart will become stronger and more _____.
rounds.answer: efficient
rounds.explanation: The text says: If you train regularly, your heart will become stronger and more efficient.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'agency' mean?
choices: Actions or words that encourage people to go against their government or authority
Doing something in a way that saves time and energy
The ability to make choices and take action
To become worse or to decline in quality
rounds.answer: The ability to make choices and take action
rounds.explanation: In our class, we have the agency to choose our own projects.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'When the Leaves Stop Speaking, part 1': "This forest was _____ sacred," said one elder.
rounds.answer: originally
rounds.explanation: The text says: "This forest was originally sacred," said one elder.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'When the Leaves Stop Speaking, part 1': Her parents were both researchers in the local environmental _____, working on soil regeneration and water...
rounds.answer: agency
rounds.explanation: The text says: Her parents were both researchers in the local environmental agency, working on soil regeneration and water cycle modelling.

rounds.prompt: What does 'originally' mean?
choices: A person who speaks for God or tells what will happen in the future

The ability to make choices and take action
To become worse or to decline in quality

rounds.prompt: What does 'imagination' mean?
